recommendations.title: The Zone of Interest
recommendations.overview: The commandant of Auschwitz, Rudolf Höss, and his wife Hedwig, strive to build a dream life for their family in a house and garden next to the camp.

recommendations.title: Under the Skin
recommendations.overview: A seductive stranger prowls the streets of Glasgow in search of prey: unsuspecting men who fall under her spell.

recommendations.title: Sexy Beast
recommendations.overview: Ex-safecracker Gal Dove has served his time behind bars and is blissfully retired to a Spanish villa paradise with a wife he adores. The idyll is shattered by the arrival of his nemesis Don Logan, intent on persuading Gal to return to London for one

recommendations.title: Ida
recommendations.overview: In 1960s Poland, young novitiate Anna is on the verge of taking her vows when she discovers a family secret dating back to the years of the German occupation.

recommendations.title: The In Between
recommendations.overview: After surviving a car accident that took the life of her boyfriend, a teenage girl believes he's attempting to reconnect with her from the after world.

recommendations.title: The Wash
recommendations.overview: With the rent due and his car booted, Sean has to come up with some ends...and fast. When his best buddy and roommate Dee Loc, suggests that Sean get a job busting suds down at the local car wash.

recommendations.title: Strange but True
recommendations.overview: A woman surprises the family of her deceased boyfriend by telling them she's pregnant with his child.

recommendations.title: Kahaani
recommendations.overview: Pregnant and alone in the city of Kolkata, a woman begins a relentless search for her missing husband, only to find that nothing is what it seems.

recommendations.title: Shirley
recommendations.overview: A famous horror writer finds inspiration for her next book after she and her husband take in a young couple.

recommendations.title: Emmanuelle: The Joys of a Woman
recommendations.overview: Emmanuelle returns to her husband in Hong Kong and proceeds to have several extramarital affairs -- with his knowledge, of course. Her husband's lover and American guest are both very puzzled by their openness.
